news.title: MacroSilicon Launches MS2131 4K USB Video Capture Chip
news.summary: New MS2131 delivers professional 4K30 capture capability with hardware encoding for content creators and streamers.

content.text: MacroSilicon has officially launched the MS2131, a high-performance USB 3.0 video capture chip supporting HDMI 2.0 input up to 4K (3840x2160) resolution at 30 frames per second. This new product expands MacroSilicon's capture portfolio into the professional 4K content creation market.
4K Capture for Professionals

The MS2131 addresses the growing demand for 4K capture solutions among professional content creators, YouTubers, and live streamers. With hardware MJPEG encoding and support for both 4K and 1080p60 outputs simultaneously, the chip enables flexible workflows for recording and streaming.
Key Features

items: USB 3.0 UVC compliant - plug and play
Dual output support for recording and streaming
Compatible with OBS, XSplit, and all major platforms

content.text: The MS2131 maintains the ease-of-use that MacroSilicon capture chips are known for, with UVC compliance ensuring immediate compatibility with Windows, Mac, and Linux systems without driver installation.

news.author: MacroSilicon Marketing

news.title: MacroSilicon Achieves ISO 14001 Environmental Certification
news.summary: Company demonstrates commitment to environmental management with international certification.

content.text: MacroSilicon announced today that it has successfully achieved ISO 14001:2015 certification for its environmental management system. This certification recognizes MacroSilicon's commitment to sustainable business practices and environmental responsibility.
Environmental Commitment

The ISO 14001 certification covers all aspects of MacroSilicon's operations including product design, manufacturing coordination, and corporate facilities. The company has implemented comprehensive environmental management procedures to minimize its ecological footprint.
Sustainability Initiatives

items: Reduced power consumption in chip designs

content.text: Achieving ISO 14001 certification reflects our commitment to being a responsible corporate citizen. We believe technology innovation and environmental stewardship can go hand in hand.
content.author: Dr. Chen Wei, VP of Operations

news.author: MacroSilicon Corporate Communications

news.title: MacroSilicon Partners with Gaming Peripheral Manufacturer
news.summary: Strategic partnership to integrate MacroSilicon capture technology into gaming capture cards and streaming devices.

content.text: MacroSilicon has entered into a strategic partnership with a leading gaming peripheral manufacturer to integrate MS2130 and MS2131 capture chips into their upcoming line of game capture cards and streaming devices.
Gaming Market Expansion

This partnership marks MacroSilicon's significant entry into the gaming capture market, competing with established brands like Elgato and AVerMedia. The combination of MacroSilicon's capture technology and the partner's gaming expertise is expected to deliver compelling products for content creators.
Product Lineup

items: Portable streaming device for mobile creators
Multi-input capture solution for complex setups

content.text: Products are expected to launch in Q2 2024 with competitive pricing 30-40% below current market leaders while maintaining equivalent performance.

news.author: MacroSilicon Business Development

news.title: MacroSilicon Expands into Automotive Video Solutions
news.summary: New AEC-Q100 qualified products target in-vehicle infotainment and camera systems.

content.text: MacroSilicon has announced the expansion of its product portfolio into the automotive market with AEC-Q100 qualified versions of its popular video interface chips. The new automotive-grade products are designed for in-vehicle infotainment systems, surround-view cameras, and digital cockpit displays.
Automotive Product Portfolio

The automotive product line includes temperature-qualified versions of MS9332 (HDMI to MIPI converter) and MS9601 (MIPI to HDMI converter), both rated for -40°C to +105°C operation. These products meet the stringent reliability requirements of automotive applications.
Target Applications
MacroSilicon is also pursuing ISO 26262 functional safety certification for selected products to support safety-critical applications.

news.author: MacroSilicon Automotive Team

news.title: MacroSilicon Invests $100M in 8K Video Technology R&D
news.summary: Major investment to develop next-generation 8K video processing and capture solutions.

content.text: MacroSilicon announced a $100 million investment over the next three years to develop next-generation 8K video processing technology. This investment will accelerate the development of 8K capture chips, high-bandwidth interface converters, and advanced video processing solutions.
Technology Roadmap

The investment will fund development of 8K60 capture capabilities, HDMI 2.1 interface support, and advanced AI-powered video enhancement technologies. First 8K products are expected to sample in 2025.
Research Focus Areas
The investment will also expand MacroSilicon's engineering team by 200 additional R&D personnel across its Hefei, Shanghai, and Shenzhen design centers.

news.author: MacroSilicon Corporate Communications

news.title: MacroSilicon Technology Powers 10,000+ Classroom Capture Systems
news.summary: Major deployment in education sector for hybrid learning and distance education applications.

content.text: MacroSilicon announced that its MS2130 USB capture chips have been deployed in over 10,000 classroom capture systems across educational institutions in China. This large-scale deployment supports the growing demand for hybrid learning and distance education capabilities.
Education Market Success

The deployment includes K-12 schools, universities, and vocational training centers. The plug-and-play nature of MacroSilicon's UVC-compliant capture solutions has made them ideal for educational environments where ease of use is critical.
Deployment Results

items: Compatible with all major conferencing platforms
Positive feedback from teachers and students

content.text: This successful deployment has established MacroSilicon as a key technology provider in the education technology market.

news.author: MacroSilicon Education Team

news.title: MacroSilicon Wins China Semiconductor Innovation Award
news.summary: Recognized for breakthrough achievements in video processing chip design and market impact.

content.text: MacroSilicon has been honored with the China Semiconductor Industry Association (CSIA) Innovation Award for its significant contributions to video processing semiconductor technology. The award recognizes MacroSilicon's breakthrough in delivering high-performance, cost-effective video capture and processing solutions.
Award Recognition

The CSIA Innovation Award specifically acknowledges MacroSilicon's success in developing USB video capture chips that compete with international vendors while offering significant cost advantages. The company's products have helped reduce China's dependence on imported video processing chips.
Industry Impact

MacroSilicon's achievements have disrupted the video capture market, previously dominated by foreign suppliers. The company's chips are now used by leading brands in streaming devices, gaming peripherals, and professional AV equipment.
Future Commitment

In accepting the award, MacroSilicon's CEO reaffirmed the company's commitment to continued innovation in video processing technology and expanding into new markets including automotive and professional broadcast.

news.author: MacroSilicon Corporate Communications

news.title: MacroSilicon Expands International Sales by 150%
news.summary: Strong growth in overseas markets driven by streaming and gaming applications.

content.text: MacroSilicon reported 150% year-over-year growth in international sales, driven by strong demand for its USB video capture chips in streaming, gaming, and video conferencing applications. The company has expanded its distribution network to over 20 countries.
Global Market Expansion

Key growth markets include North America (streaming and gaming), Europe (professional AV), and Southeast Asia (education and conferencing). The company has established local technical support teams in the US and Europe to better serve international customers.
Product Localization
MacroSilicon has adapted its product offerings to meet regional requirements and certification standards. Products now carry FCC, CE, and other regional certifications required for global markets.
This international expansion represents MacroSilicon's strategy to diversify its revenue base beyond the domestic Chinese market while leveraging its competitive technology advantages.

news.author: MacroSilicon International Sales
